name: Schneekarhütte
description: Traditional mountain hut in the Horberg/Schneekar area with homemade Tyrolean food.

name: Bergrestaurant Horberg
description: Main mountain restaurant on Horberg with panoramic views across the Zillertal.

name: Jausenstation Tappenalm
description: Snack station near the Tappenalm chairlift. Quick bites and hot drinks.

name: Heidi's Skialm
description: Cosy ski alm with sunny terrace, Glühwein and homemade cakes.

name: Waldhütte
description: Forest hut tucked in the trees with wood-fired grill and local specialties.

name: Christlerhof
description: Popular mid-mountain restaurant with a large sun terrace and à la carte menu.

name: Restaurant Vogelnest
description: Scenic restaurant near the Rastkogel/Eggalm junction. Great panorama.

name: Almstüberl
description: Small alm restaurant with authentic Austrian atmosphere and daily specials.

name: Pilzbar
description: Après-ski bar shaped like a mushroom! Cocktails and party atmosphere from 3pm.

name: Hilde's Skitenne
description: Lively ski bar with DJ sets and a famous Jägertee. Popular in the afternoon.

name: Panorahma
description: Panorama restaurant near Penken summit. Breathtaking 360° views. Table reservation recommended.

name: Penkentenne
description: Large restaurant with terrace at the Penkenbahn top. Self-service and table service.

name: Lattenalm
description: Traditional alm restaurant in the Eggalm sector with local cheese and meat specialties.

name: Egger Skialm
description: Family-run ski alm with homemade Kaiserschmarrn and Apfelstrudel.

name: Bergrestaurant Eggalm
description: Main restaurant on the Eggalm plateau with sunny terrace.

name: Filzenstadl
description: Rustic barn-style restaurant near the Filzen lifts with hearty mountain food.

name: Wiesenhof
description: Meadow restaurant with sun loungers and DJ on Sundays.

name: Stoaner's Bienenhäusl
description: Unique beehive-themed hut. Try the honey schnapps!

name: Granatalm
description: Alm restaurant near the Penken Express chairlift. Good lunch options.

name: Gschösswandhaus
description: Historic mountain house with spectacular cliff-edge views. One of the most scenic in Mayrhofen.

name: Bergrast
description: Quick service rest stop with snacks, soups and hot drinks.

name: Stieralm
description: Traditional Tyrolean alm with wooden interior and great Schnitzel.

name: Grillhofalm
description: Famous for their grilled meats and mountain platters. Sun terrace with deckchairs.

name: Unterbergalm
description: Alm restaurant at the Unterbergalm chair. Home cooking, reasonable prices.

name: Schiestl's Sunnalm
description: Sunny alm with comfortable wooden terrace and excellent Tyrolean dumplings.

name: Eisberghütte
description: Small hut near the black runs. Good place to warm up after Harakiri!

name: Kressbrunnalm
description: Alm in a sheltered valley location. Quiet and traditional.

name: Penkenjochhaus
description: At the very top of Penken (2095m). Panoramic summit restaurant with views to Hintertux Glacier.

name: Lärchwaldhütte
description: Cosy forest hut in the Lärchwald area. Good for families.

name: Kasermandl Penken
description: Known for their Kaserspätzle (cheesy noodles) and local beers.

name: Ahornhütte
description: Traditional mountain hut on Ahorn plateau with homemade soups and strudels.

name: FreiRaum Panorama
description: Modern panorama terrace at the Ahornbahn top. 180° view. Great coffee.

name: Bergrestaurant Lämmerbichl
description: Restaurant at the Lämmerbichl chairlift with a wide terrace.

name: WhiteLounge Ahorn
description: Igloo village and sundeck on the Ahorn plateau. Unique experience — must visit!

name: FalknerOase
description: Rest area with deck chairs and light refreshments. Great spot to relax.

name: Wirtshaus am Tuxer Ferner
description: Restaurant at the glacier access level. Warm up before heading to 3250m.

name: Gletscherhütte Hintertux
description: High altitude mountain hut on the glacier (2660m). Hot soup essential here!

name: Tuxerjochhaus
description: Historic mountain hut at 2338m on the Tuxer Joch ridge.

name: Spannagelhaus
description: Alpine refuge and restaurant, accessible from Hintertux. Overnight stays available.

name: Sommerberg Restaurant
description: Restaurant at the Sommerberg lifts base area.

name: Bichlalm
description: Alm restaurant in the valley approaching Hintertux. Good for pre-glacier warm-up.

name: Ticket Office — Penkenbahn
description: Ski pass purchase, rental shop and ski storage at Penkenbahn base.

name: Ticket Office — Ahornbahn
description: Ski pass purchase at Ahornbahn base station.

name: Ticket Office — Horbergbahn
description: Ski pass purchase at Horbergbahn base in Schwendau.

name: Ticket Office — Eggalm
description: Ski pass purchase at Eggalmbahn base in Lanersbach.

name: Ticket Office — Hintertux
description: Glacier ski pass and rental at Hintertux base station.

name: Ski School Mayrhofen
description: Professional ski and snowboard instruction for all ages and levels. Group and private lessons.

name: Ski School Ahorn
description: Gentle Ahorn beginners' slope ski school, perfect for children and first-timers.

name: PenkenPark (Freestyle)
description: Mayrhofen's main freestyle terrain park with 6 areas: beginner to pro. Jumps, rails, halfpipe.

name: RacingParadise Unterberg
description: Two timed race courses (Gold & Silver) on the Unterberg slope. Race your friends!

name: Pepis Kinderland (Kids Park)
description: Supervised children's area at Penken summit with ski school, magic carpet and gentle slopes.

name: Übungsland Ahorn (Kids)
description: Large beginner plateau on Ahorn, perfect for families with young children.

name: Übungsland Lärchwald
description: Sheltered family ski area in the Lärchwald with magic carpet and gentle blue runs.

name: AlbertAdler PlayWorld Mösl
description: Kids adventure area at the Möslbahn base. Fun zones and beginner ski lessons.

name: Übungsland Lämmerbichl
description: Beginners' area at Eggalm with dedicated children's instructor team.

name: KinderLand Horberg
description: Horberg's children's learning area with gentle slopes and carpet lift.

name: First Aid / Mountain Rescue — Penken
description: Mountain rescue and first aid station at Penken summit area.

name: First Aid — Ahorn
description: First aid point on the Ahorn plateau.

name: 📸 PhotoPoint Harakiri
description: Professional photo service. Get your Harakiri photo taken and buy it at the valley station!

name: 📸 PhotoPoint Mösl
description: Automatic photo capture point on the valley run near Mösl.

name: 📸 SkiMovie Recording
description: SkiMovie system — your run is filmed automatically on piste 16. Buy your video at the valley.

name: Eagle's Stage — Bird of Prey Show
description: Spectacular daily bird of prey (eagle, falcon) show at the Ahornbahn summit. Free admission.

name: AlbertAdler AdventureTrail
description: Interactive adventure trail for families with info stations about nature and alpine life.

name: BigChair Ahorn
description: Giant chairlift seat photo opportunity at the Ahorn summit. Perfect for photos!

name: GreifenBrücke Bridge
description: Spectacular suspension bridge on the Ahorn plateau. Thrilling views down to the valley.

name: PenkenPark Info
description: PenkenPark info point — 6 park areas from beginner to pro. Pick up the park map here.

name: Natur Eis Palast (Ice Palace)
description: Natural ice palace inside the Hintertux Glacier at 3250m. Unique underground ice sculptures.

name: Spannagelhöhle (Show Cave)
description: Austria's highest show cave (2531m). Guided tours available.

name: Betterpark Hintertux
description: Freestyle terrain park on the Hintertux Glacier — open year round including summer!

name: Flohpark Hintertux
description: Children's fun park at the glacier area with safe slopes and easy carpet lifts.

name: Winter Hiking Path — Penken
description: Signposted winter hiking trail along the Penken mountain with spectacular views.

name: Winter Hiking Path — Filzenkogel
description: Circular winter hiking trail around the Filzenkogel area.

name: BergWaldWeg — Forest Path
description: Scenic forest walk through the Penken pine trees. Accessible on skis or on foot.

name: 🏔 Penkenjoch Summit (2095m)
description: Top of the Penken Express chairlift. Views to Zillertal Alps, Harakiri starts here.

name: 🏔 Ahorn Summit (1965m)
description: Top of the Ahornbahn cable car. Famous sunrise views. Wide beginner plateau.

name: 🏔 Horbergjoch (2550m)
description: Top of the Horbergjoch chairlift. Highest accessible point in Mayrhofen main area.

name: 🏔 Rastkogel (2762m)
description: High alpine viewpoint. On clear days you can see the Dolomites.

name: 🏔 Gefrorene Wand (3250m)
description: Highest point on the Hintertux Glacier — top of the Gletscherbus 3. Panoramic summit terrace.

name: Panoramaterrasse Hintertux
description: Summit panorama terrace at 3250m with 360° views over the Zillertal Alps.
